title: Baby Fruit Feeder Set, Includes 2 Food Dummy Feeders with 3 Size Nipples, Silicone Feeder for Babies, Pacifier & Storage Containersr
features: Safe and Healthy Feeding for Your Baby: This baby food feeder is made from the highest-quality, food-grade silicone, ensuring our baby fruit feeder pacifier is completely safe for your baby. Introduce fresh solids and purees from our baby food storage containers in a secure, mess-free way. This healthy feeding method makes our teething dummy fruit feeder an essential tool for your baby’s development, providing a soothing and nutritious treat.

Perfect for Teething and Self-Feeding: Our teething dummy fruit feeder is specifically designed to soothe sore gums while helping your baby start the transition to solids. With this baby fruit feeder pacifier, your child can safely explore new flavors without choking risks. It's an ideal baby food feeder for promoting self-feeding independence. Fill this effective teething dummy fruit feeder with frozen fruit from your baby food storage containers for instant teething relief.

Convenient and Easy to Clean: The durable silicone baby food feeder is incredibly simple to clean, unlike traditional mesh feeders that trap food particles. Our entire baby fruit feeder pacifier set, including the handy baby food storage containers, is dishwasher-safe for a quick and hassle-free cleanup. This convenient design means you spend less time cleaning your teething dummy fruit feeder and more time with your baby.

Versatile and Durable Design: This baby fruit feeder pacifier is designed to grow with your baby, suitable for ages 3-24 months. It works perfectly as a complete system with the included baby food storage containers, which freeze food into ideal-sized portions. Whether it’s puree or fruit chunks, this versatile baby food feeder makes mealtimes easy. The durable design ensures this teething dummy fruit feeder will last through all stages of your baby’s growth.

Complete Set for Easy Feeding: This all-in-one set includes the essential baby food feeder, replaceable pouches, and our practical baby food storage containers with lids. You get everything you need, including a top-rated teething dummy fruit feeder and a bonus baby fruit feeder pacifier for convenience. With our complete set of baby food storage containers, meal prep is organized and effortless, making it the perfect gift for new parents.
